channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Spotify now lets everyone turn off all videos in its app
item.description: The controls can be used to choose an audio-first experience on the app or a video-enhanced one, Spotify says.

item.title: Comment changer ses DNS sur Windows, Android, iPhone pour accéder à un web plus rapide ?
item.description: Le serveur DNS est le premier intermédiaire entre nos appareils et le site web. Selon son fournisseur, cela peut poser des problèmes. Avec ce dossier, vous en saurez plus sur cet élément clé du web, quel serveur choisir pour surfer plus vite et comment configurer son smartphone Android ou iOS ou son PC.

item.title: Retour surprise du Galaxy Z TriFold : l’ultime chance de s’offrir le smartphone à trois écrans
item.description: Bonne nouvelle : Samsung vient d'annoncer un réassort inattendu de son smartphone pliable format XXL. Mais attention, cette vente aux allures de baroud d'honneur sera bel et bien votre dernière occasion de l'acquérir.

item.title: The FBI Didn't Answer Texts From Minnesota Investigators for Days After Renee Good’s Killing
item.description: Messages sent to the FBI by an investigator with the Minnesota Bureau of Criminal Apprehension went ignored for at least two days, per records obtained by WIRED.

item.title: Coup de théâtre : Elon Musk aurait changé d’avis pour enfin lancer une Tesla compacte et abordable
item.description: Face à l'érosion de ses ventes, Tesla opère un virage stratégique inattendu. Selon de récentes indiscrétions, l'entreprise d'Elon Musk développerait en secret un tout nouveau SUV électrique compact et abordable, taillé sur mesure pour concurrencer les best-sellers européens. Poids plume, tarif cassé et retour au pragmatisme face à la réalité du marché : voici les premiers secrets de ce modèle censé relancer la machine Tesla. ...

item.title: Decathlon brade le radar Garmin avec feu arrière pour renforcer votre sécurité à vélo sans payer le prix fort
item.description: Le Garmin Varia RTL515 est un accessoire pratique pour voir et être vu à vélo, que vous retrouvez en promotion chez Decathlon à 129 euros, contre 159 euros habituellement.

item.title: DJI Avinox gonfle les performances des vélos électriques avec 2 nouveaux moteurs surpuissants
item.description: DJI Avinox est de retour avec deux nouveaux modèles de moteurs pour vélos électriques, dont l’un est destiné à des performances sportives intenses. Deux écrans et une nouvelle batterie ont également été présentés par la marque.

item.title: There's a huge Brooks running shoe sale at Amazon — I found the 12 best deals that I'd buy with up to 30% off
item.description: Brooks makes some of the best running shoes on the market, and I've hand-picked the 12 best deals at Amazon, with up to 30% off and prices from just $86.

item.title: DJI dévoile la seconde génération de ses VTT électriques, avec le surpuissant moteur Avinox M2
item.description: Successeurs des PL, les nouveaux VTTAE Amflow PX et PR Carbon veulent marquer le coup avec l’intégration des tout nouveaux moteurs maison de DJI, les Avinox M2S et M2.

item.title: Instagram expands its movie inspired content restrictions for teens internationally
item.description: Instagram first debuted its movie rating inspired content settings in limited countries in 2025.

item.title: There's a sneaky way to watch the Masters 2026 for *FREE*
item.description: We've found a way that you can stream Masters 2026 golf from the Augusta National for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Inside the Pro-Iran Meme Machine Trolling Trump With AI Lego Cartoons
item.description: Since the beginning of the Iran war, the group Explosive Media has released over a dozen viral videos mocking Trump and the US.

item.title: MSI's RTX3050 AutoCAD-capable laptop gets a huge $200 price cut — 15.6 inch Thin A15 is under $700, but it won't be this price for long
item.description: MSI’s Thin A15 pairs a Ryzen 5 7535HS processor with 16GB of DDR4 memory and a 512GB NVMe SSD for AutoCAD projects and technical multitasking.

item.title: How to watch NBA live streams online for free
item.description: How to watch NBA for free. Live stream NBA games for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: I Tested the Instagram-Famous Ridge Wallet and I’m a Convert
item.description: This bare-bones, no-nonsense wallet has continuously impressed me since I started using it.

item.title: “We want Surfshark to be the Revolut of cybersecurity.”: How Surfshark's new CEO is looking to shape accessible privacy
item.description: Surfshark's new CEO is looking to create one app to rule them all, but how?

item.title: Artemis II : les astronautes affrontent un nouveau problème de toilettes que la Nasa prend très au sérieux
item.description: Vous n’avez pas vraiment envie de savoir où les astronautes du programme Apollo faisaient leurs besoins. Croyez-moi, ceux d'Artemis II sont mieux lotis de ce point de vue. Ou plutôt, ils auraient dû l’être… car de ce côté-là, tout ne s’est pas passé comme prévu.

item.title: ‘Man of Tomorrow’ Is On the Hunt For Maxima
item.description: Although James Gunn has denied some names, even more candidates have emerged for the role.

item.title: Waymo is offering to help cities fix their potholes
item.description: In recent months, some cities have sought a new recruit in their forever war against potholes: Waymo. Municipal officials in multiple cities where Waymo operates have reached out to the robotaxi operator for help in locating potholes on their streets, assuming that Waymo kept such data. Fortunately for them, Waymo does, and it has recently […]

item.title: The Exit 8 movie is even better if you play the game first
item.description: There's an intriguing new video game adaptation to watch in theaters - and no, it's not that one. Exit 8, based on the game of the same name, hits the big screen on April 10th, and it's part of a burgeoning trend of horror movies directly inspired by indie games and liminal scares on YouTube. […]

item.title: This founder helped build SpaceX’s most powerful rocket engine. Now he’s building a ‘fighter jet for orbit’
item.description: The company's novel rocket engine could be a game changer for the U.S. military.

item.title: Collide Capital raises $95M fund to back fintech, future-of-work startups
item.description: Collide Capital, founded by Brian Hollins and Aaron Samuels, announced Thursday the close of a $95 million Fund II.

item.title: Radify’s sci-fi plasma reactors could break China’s dominance of rare earth elements
item.description: Radify Metals is developing a new way to process a variety of metals that promises to be pollution free.

item.title: Waymo robotaxis are tracking potholes and sharing that data with Waze users
item.description: Two Alphabet-owned businesses are teaming up to find potholes and share that information with cities.

item.title: 'AI is only as strong as its data': Why Microsoft is betting on this little-known startup’s 700B parameter model to predict your next purchase
item.description: Microsoft and Yobi partner to deploy a 700 billion parameter AI model that predicts consumer intent using consented behavioral data across platforms.

item.title: Nicole Kidman's most underrated Amazon horror movie is now a sleeper streaming hit on HBO Max — and you need to see it to believe it
item.description: Nobody is more booked and busy than Nicole Kidman, but her deranged Amazon horror movie has been ridiculously overlooked — but it's making a comeback on HBO Max.

item.title: Spotify now lets you turn off all video
item.description: Sometimes, you just want your dang music streaming app to play music. Spotify, which has increasingly incorporated video features through the years, is finally giving us the option to turn that mess off. Behold: universal video toggles.Spotify's video settings control several areas. First, the old Canvas toggle (videos on the Now Playing screen) is still there. But now you'll find two additional switches alongside it. One lets you control whether the app plays music videos. The other, "all other videos," covers video podcasts, vertically scrolling videos and artist clips.You'll find the contro...

item.title: I tried Meta’s new Muse Spark AI model — and it feels like ChatGPT built for the social internet
item.description: Meta AI's new Muse Spark model gives AI a social media sheen.

item.title: Voici les premières photos du Xpeng Mona L03 : pourquoi ce SUV électrique chinois pourrait cartonner en Europe
item.description: Xpeng va bientôt lancer une nouvelle voiture électrique abordable, le Mona L03. Ce SUV devrait arriver en Europe et concurrencera frontalement les Renault Scénic E-Tech, Skoda Elroq et Volkswagen ID.4. Voici les premières images.

item.title: Amazon’s Starlink competitor Leo gets a new date
item.description: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy says the company's space-internet service Leo (formerly known as Project Kuiper) will "launch in mid-2026." I'm going to assume that means proper commercial availability since the company already announced the start of an "enterprise preview" at the end of 2025, when the service was supposed to originally launch. Unlike SpaceX's Starlink […]...

item.title: “C’est terminé, ça charge” : Xpeng règle enfin son plus gros problème sur les Superchargeurs Tesla (mais il y a un hic)
item.description: Xpeng vient de régler l'un des plus gros problèmes sur ses nouvelles G6 et G9 vendues en France. Les deux voitures électriques qui se rechargent le plus rapidement de France sont désormais compatibles avec les Tesla Superchargeurs. Mais avec toutefois une limitation.

item.title: La 5G ne s’améliorera pas cet été : les nouvelles fréquences attendront 2035
item.description: Les opérateurs attendaient 80 MHz de spectre supplémentaire cet été. Ils n'auront rien.

item.title: Apple iPhone 17e review: Ticks every box but one
item.description: The new "affordable" iPhone, Apple's iPhone 17e, addresses some issues with the previous model, but not the camera. Review.

item.title: The Nintendo Switch 2 version of 007 First Light has been delayed until 'later this summer'
item.description: IO Interactive has announced that the Nintendo Switch 2 version of 007 First Light has been delayed to this summer.

item.title: « J’ai failli me faire avoir » : l’IA débarque dans les arnaques par SMS
item.description: Les arnaques par SMS se modernisent et utilisent désormais l'IA. J'en ai fait les frais ce matin et c'est de plus en plus bien ficelé.

item.title: French email provider accidentally leaked 40 million records — L’Oreal, Renault, French government data exposed
item.description: Millions of email addresses exposed through an open Elasticsearch cluster.

item.title: 'I think audio is 90% of what scares people in horror movies': Undertone director Ian Tuason on why he chose to focus on sound for his directorial debut
item.description: Undertone's sound design has been a huge selling point for the horror movie, and director Ian Tuason explained why he wanted to focus on it.

item.title: What if your computer mouse ate a pair of earbuds? Meet Honor’s MouseBuds Pro with ‘skin-like coating'
item.description: Is it a mouse? Is it earbuds? Is it a plane? No, it's the Honor Choice MouseBuds Pro, which you can buy right now if you really, really want.

item.title: Ce puissant laptop gaming sous RTX 5070 est 300 € moins cher avec Resident Evil Requiem offert
item.description: Le Lenovo Legion 5 15IRX10 est un PC portable haut de gamme à la configuration solide qui est disponible à la Fnac pour 1 699,99 euros au lieu de 1 999,99 euros.

item.title: IA : Meta change de stratégie avec Muse Spark, le premier modèle de son laboratoire de « superintelligence »
item.description: Le champion autoproclamé de l'IA open source vient de verrouiller son nouveau modèle. L'ironie est difficile à avaler.

item.title: Ex-Tesla engineer’s startup taps Pronto to help automate a copper mine
item.description: Pronto's autonomous haulage trucks are about to start operating at Mariana Minerals's Utah copper mine -- the first such deal since Pronto got acquired by Travis Kalanick's Atoms Inc.

item.title: ‘It’s almost worthless’: Google Home users slam ‘painfully slow’ Gemini assistant — but it’s getting a global rollout no matter how much you dislike it
item.description: Google Home has started expanding Gemini globally, but some users have yet to get along with it.

item.title: The new Romo P robovac from drone expert DJI has the most jaw-dropping obstacle avoidance I’ve ever seen
item.description: Welcome to the future with DJI’s first foray into the pantheon of home cleaning — expensive, but extremely capable.

item.title: JBL Live 780NC and 680NC review: Great leaps, greater missteps
item.description:
JBL introduced two new headphones to its Live series lineup and both are fighting to live up to expectations. Don’t get me wrong, the JBL Live 780NC and 680NC are both a solid set of cans, but in a sea of noise-cancelling headphones, one of them definitely has more appeal. The biggest differences between these two headphones are the over-ear and on-ear cups, and surprisingly, their audio quality. Let’s get into what does and doesn’t make them so special.
Design and comfort Outside of varying colors and cup sizes, the JBL Live 780NC and 680NC look practically identical. They have these hock...

item.title: 9 leaders on what they’d change about managing staff
item.description: Rethink your existing narratives to determine what will work better. Leadership and management lessons aren’t always figured out off the bat. Making some mistakes and realizing that what works for you doesn’t work for everyone else is valuable. It’s impossible to go back and change the past, but you can think through how you manage now and see if it’s still effective. We asked our Fast Company Impact Council members about their staff management lessons and how their approach has evolved. Their insights can help you lead your staff better without having to make those same mistakes yourself. Her...

item.title: How the Hands Behind Rocky Got Hired for ‘Project Hail Mary’
item.description: Puppeteer and voice of Rocky, James Ortiz, spoke about becoming the already iconic character.

item.title: OpenAI 'pauses' its Stargate UK data center plan
item.description: OpenAI is putting the brakes on Stargate UK, according to Bloomberg. That’s the company’s AI infrastructure project with NVIDIA that’s meant to help the UK build out its sovereign computing capabilities. The company announced Stargate UK back in September, but it launched a strategic partnership with the UK government months before that. Stargate UK would enable the government to run top AI models locally from data centers inside the region, “particularly for specialist use cases where jurisdiction matters.” But now OpenAI is pausing the project due to high cost of energy and regulatory issues...
